slate_grade_note: Only 2 games today but both offer clean edges — USA +105 ML is a standout plus-money value on a host nation, Canada -120 is within the ceiling against a 12-year WC absentee.

official_plays.edge_summary: The ESM framework's clearest rule: always prefer plus-money. USA at +105 is positive money on a host nation that is realistically a 55-60% favorite — the market is offering a 6-10 point edge in implied probability right out of the gate. Home crowd, full-strength squad, and a Paraguay side ranked outside the top 40.
key_factors: USA +105 = positive money on the better team — only needs 48.8% win rate to profit long-term
Host nation playing on home soil with full crowd support (structural advantage)
Paraguay ranked outside FIFA top 40, limited attacking quality against quality defense
USA roster depth (Pulisic, Weah, McKennie) gives Berhalter rotation and tactical flexibility
CONMEBOL qualifiers played; Paraguay not peaking, USA sharpened in final friendlies
official_plays.main_risk: Paraguay parks the bus early, holds for a draw — group stage point-accumulation strategy.

official_plays.edge_summary: Canada -120 is comfortably within the -130 juice ceiling and represents fair value against a Bosnia side that has not appeared in a World Cup since 2014. Twelve years away from this stage is a significant rust and adjustment factor. Alphonso Davies and Jonathan David give Canada genuine threats that Bosnia's rebuilt squad has never faced at this level.
key_factors: Canada -120 well within hard ceiling; clean price on the quality side
Bosnia-Herzegovina absent from World Cup since 2014 — 12-year gap in major tournament experience
Canada co-hosting 2026 — home crowd factor in their opener
Alphonso Davies (Bayern Munich) and Jonathan David (Lille) are top-tier attackers
Bosnia squad rebuilt with younger players who lack major tournament pressure experience
official_plays.main_risk: Bosnia's defensive discipline neutralizes Canada's attack through 90 minutes; low-scoring game ends 0-0 or 1-1.

quick_reads: USA +105 is today's standout play — positive money on a host nation is exactly what the ESM framework is built to find. The market is underpricing USA by 6-10 implied probability points.
Canada -120 is the only other game on the slate. Within the ceiling, clear quality advantage, and Bosnia's 12-year WC absence is a legitimate edge factor.
Thin slate (2 games) — do not force extra plays. Two clean edges at 2u each is the right card size for today.
pass_notes: No totals or BTTS plays: exact totals lines not confirmed from live source — will not fabricate lines per ESM data integrity rules.

Bosnia ML +380: Same — no edge case justifying backing a 12-year WC absentee against a host co-nation.
